3.gl: properly, a dumb beast; especially any large quadruped or animal (often collective)
3.dv: from an unused root (probably meaning to be mute);

3.gl: to be impure in a religious sense

4.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)

4.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
4.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

4.gl: properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind)
4.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
4.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

5.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person

6.gl: illumination or (concrete) luminary (in every sense, including lightning, happiness, etc.)
6.kj: bright, clear, [phrase] day, light (-ning), morning, sun.

to be extinguished; figuratively, to expire or be dried up
6.kj: be extinct, consumed, put out, quenched.

7.gl: to press (intransitive), i.e. be narrow; figuratively, be in distress

7.gl: to throw out, down or away (literally or figuratively)

12.kj: beam, board, chamber, corner, leaf, plank, rib, side (chamber).

from the same as H181 (אוּד) (in the sense of bending down);

skin (as naked); by implication, hide, leather

properly, a refuge, i.e. (objective) security, or (subjective) assurance
a tent (as clearly conspicuous from a distance)

14.kj: break (off), burst, draw (away), lift up, pluck (away, off), pull (out), root out.

15.gl: to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)

15.dv: a primitive root (apparently akin (by transmission) to H7901 (שָׁכַב) through the idea of lodging; compare H5531 (סִכְלוּת), H7925 (שָׁכַם));

15.gl: (adjectively) at home; hence (by implication of satisfaction) lovely; also (noun) a home, of God (temple), men (residence), flocks (pasture), or wild animals (den)
15.kj: comely, dwelling (place), fold, habitation, pleasant place, sheepcote, stable, tarried.

15.kj: corruption, ig(norantly), for lack of, where no...is, so that no, none, not, un(awares), without.

15.gl: to toss about; by implication, to diffuse, winnow

16.kj: be ashamed, clean, be confounded, (make) dry (up), (do) shame(-fully), [idiom] utterly, wither (away).

16.gl: properly, the upper part, used only adverbially with prefix upward, above, overhead, from the top, etc.
16.kj: above, exceeding(-ly), forward, on ([idiom] very) high, over, up(-on, -ward), very.

16.gl: severed, i.e. harvest (as reaped), the crop, the time, the reaper, or figuratively; also a limb (of a tree, or simply foliage)

17.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

17.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

17.gl: properly, separate by awall, i.e. outside, outdoors
17.kj: abroad, field, forth, highway, more, out(-side, -ward), street, without.
17.dv: or (shortened) חֻץ; (both forms feminine in the plural) from an unused root meaning to sever;

17.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
17.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
17.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

18.kj: chase (away), [idiom] could not, depart, flee ([idiom] apace, away), (re-) move, thrust away, wander (abroad, -er, -ing).

18.kj: bright, clear, [phrase] day, light (-ning), morning, sun.

18.gl: the dark; hence (literally) darkness; figuratively, misery, destruction, death, ignorance, sorrow, wickedness

19.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
19.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
19.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

19.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
a temporary abode; by extension, a permanent residence
19.kj: dwelling, pilgrimage, where sojourn, be a stranger. Compare H4032 (מָגוֹר).
19.dv: or מָגֻר; from H1481 (גּוּר) in the sense of lodging;
from an unused root meaning to propagate;

20.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

20.gl: hinder; generally, late or last; specifically (as facing the east) western
20.kj: after (-ward), to come, following, hind(-er, -ermost, -most), last, latter, rereward, ut(ter) most.

20.gl: to seize (often with the accessory idea of holding in possession)

affrighted, [idiom] horribly, [idiom] sore, storm. See H8181 (שֵׂעָר).

21.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
21.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

21.gl: a particle of affirmation, surely; hence (by limitation) only
21.kj: also, in any wise, at least, but, certainly, even, howbeit, nevertheless, notwithstanding, only, save, surely, of a surety, truly, verily, [phrase] wherefore, yet (but).

21.gl: a residence (including a shepherd's hut, the lair of animals, figuratively, the grave; also the Temple); specifically, the Tabernacle (properly, its wooden walls)
strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
21.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'
an-(the) other; one sort, so, some, such, them, these (same), they, this, those, thus, which, who(-m).
